title: FusedPadConv2D rank validation miss aborts process

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Use a rank-2 input tensor with paddings/filter shaped for rank-4 convolution.
expected: TensorFlow should reject the input rank mismatch before reaching a fatal C++ check.
observed: The process aborts after a CHECK failure: d < dims() (2 vs. 2).
